title: 48 Pcs Silicone Earbuds Replacement Tips, Ear Buds Tips, Earphone Eartips Replacement, Noise Isolation Cover Caps - 8 Colors, 3 Sizes
features: Premium Material: The replacement earbud tips are made of outstanding silicone material, which are soft and comfortable to wear, elastic to the touch, reusable, and durable for long time use.

Easy to Use: The silicone earplugs have superb elasticity and toughness, and will not hurt your ears; the size is reasonable, the thickness and softness are suitable, and more suitable for the ear canal, which is comfortable and stable to wear.

Practical Design: These replacement earbuds tips are good in isolation, prevent sound leakage, and can effectively enhance the overall music listening experience, and you can replace the unsuitable, dirty or old ear pads at any time.
Suitable Size: Silicone earbuds tips have three sizes, compatible with most earphones, large size is about 13 mm/0.6 inch, medium size is about 12 mm/0.47 inch, small size is about 11 mm/0.43 inch.
Package Includes: You will receive a total of 48 pcs silicone earbuds, available in 8 color and 3 sizes, 2 pcs for each color, three size earbuds and various colors can satisfy different needs.
description: Product Description Install firmly Easy to replace Comfortable and stable to wear Noise reduction
